tasks.title: Create /clean-scaffolding skill
tasks.description: Build ~/.dotfiles/claude-code-shared/skills/clean-scaffolding/SKILL.md. The skill enumerates files in docs/seeds/, docs/prd/, docs/tasks/, and docs/handoffs/ (*.md only). It shows a file-count preview, then prompts [y/N] before deletion. A --force / -y flag skips the prompt. Deletion runs plain rm with explicit enumerated paths, no -f flag, no bare rm *. The skill never touches docs/adr/ or docs/prototypes/, never runs git, and leaves empty dirs in place after deletion. No tests per standing infra convention for claude-code-shared skills.
acceptance_criteria: Skill enumerates docs/seeds/, docs/prd/, docs/tasks/, and docs/handoffs/*.md only
Preview shows file count before any deletion
[y/N] prompt required unless --force or -y is passed
Deletion uses plain rm with explicit paths, no -f flag, no bare rm *
docs/adr/ and docs/prototypes/ are never touched
Empty scaffolding dirs remain in place after deletion
tasks.pr: gh pr create --title "feat: add /clean-scaffolding skill" --body "Adds the clean-scaffolding skill to claude-code-shared. Enumerates docs/seeds, docs/prd, docs/tasks, and docs/handoffs/*.md, shows a file-count preview, prompts for confirmation, and deletes with plain rm (no -f, no bare rm *). Never touches docs/adr or docs/prototypes. Passes the block-destructive-fs.sh guard."

tasks.title: Register /clean-scaffolding via /register-skill
tasks.description: Run /register-skill pointing at the new clean-scaffolding skill to wire it into the harness.
acceptance_criteria: /clean-scaffolding skill is registered and invocable in the harness
Skill appears in available skills list
